tasks.name: deploy:app
tasks.command: fastlane {{platform=[ios, android]}} {{env=[dev, staging, prod]}} --track={{track=[alpha, beta, production]}}
tasks.description: Deploy app to specific platform and environment

tasks.name: download_apk2
tasks.command: echo 'bundle exec fastlane android download_universal_apk is_canary:{{is_canary=[true,false]}} version_code:{{version_code}} destination:build/{{version_code}}.apk'
tasks.description: Download APK with specified version and options
